description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: linux and windows. The linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a Debian image, using a matrix strategy to test with different compilers and compilation options. It installs dependencies, checks out the repository, and runs a series of steps to configure, build, and test the project. The windows job runs on a Windows 2022 environment, using a Docker container to install dependencies and build the project.
